note: Canonical feature space for the Pokédex brief. Every submission is scored present | partial | absent against each item. These are the columns of the comparison matrix and the objective spine of the rubric.

features.label: National Dex
features.counts: Lists all ~1025 species (not a truncated subset).

features.label: Instant search
features.counts: Client-side search by name and/or number with no server round-trip.

features.label: Type filter
features.counts: Filter by one or more of the 18 types.

features.label: Sorting
features.counts: Sort by id, name, and at least one base stat.

features.label: Advanced filters
features.counts: Legendary/mythical, min-BST, ability, or learnset filters.

features.label: Shareable filter URLs
features.counts: Filter/search state is reflected in the URL.

features.label: Official artwork
features.counts: High-res official artwork on detail view.

features.label: Shiny toggle
features.counts: Toggle between normal and shiny sprites/art.

features.label: Stat visualization
features.counts: Base stats as bars and/or a radar chart.

features.label: Abilities with effects
features.counts: Lists abilities with their effect text.

features.label: Breeding data
features.counts: Egg groups, gender ratio, hatch cycles, EV yield.

features.label: Moves / Items / Abilities dex
features.counts: Standalone searchable dex for moves, items or abilities.

features.label: Export / sharing
features.counts: PNG card export or Showdown import/export.
